## Summary

Describe the change and the user-facing impact.

## Validation

- [ ] `make macos-build` or `make macos-app`
- [ ] `make linux-build` when Linux code, shared core, or package metadata changes
- [ ] Manual check on a connected Aula F75 Max

## Notes

Call out any macOS permission prompts, Linux udev requirements, protocol changes, or follow-up work.
